## Acceptance-criteria evidence

- [ ] Every acceptance criterion maps to a test and evidence reference.
- [ ] Unit, integration, system and regression tests are green where applicable.
- [ ] Real code/package path was executed.
- [ ] Coverage thresholds are measured.
- [ ] Performance baseline is measured when applicable.
- [ ] No skipped/flaky/stale result is counted as PASS.
- [ ] All commands were executed through `simplicio-loop` Hub.
- [ ] Independent evidence audit passed.
- [ ] No duplicate scheduler, queue, pool, worktree or terminal state was introduced.
